overall.description: Game footage from The Last of Us Part II depicting a character swimming through a flooded, overgrown post-apocalyptic urban area during a heavy rainstorm, then traversing rooftops and elevated walkways while exploring the abandoned cityscape with a companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with lily pads

events.description: companion character emerges from water on the right side
character climbs out of water onto muddy bank

agents.ego_description: swimming through flooded street with backpack and rifle, navigating around lily pads

notable_agents.action: companion swimming alongside, then exiting water

entered.detail: submerged vehicle partially visible in the water near the grassy bank
green lily pads floating on the water surface throughout the flooded area
murky water covering the former street with reflections of surrounding buildings
overgrown grass and vegetation lining the edges of the flooded street
tall modern building visible through the rain and trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The character swims through a rain-soaked flooded urban street covered in lily pads, passing a submerged abandoned car. A companion swims alongside before both characters climb onto the muddy bank, transitioning from water to land.

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow dirt path bordered by tall grass, moving away from the water

entered.detail: narrow muddy trail winding through dense vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense tall grass and vegetation, moving inland from the flooded street. The path leads toward an elevated position with the water now visible only on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook of flooded downtown district

events.description: emerging from enclosed path onto open overlook with panoramic city view
character turns from facing the city to walking along the concrete edge

agents.ego_description: standing on concrete overlook surveying the flooded cityscape, then turning to walk along the edge

notable_agents.action: companion standing on the edge looking out at the city

entered.detail: dense cluster of skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible through the rain
streets far below completely submerged in water with abandoned vehicles visible
crumbling concrete ledge of the elevated structure

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a high concrete overlook revealing a breathtaking view of a flooded post-apocalyptic city. Skyscrapers rise in the distance while streets below are completely submerged. The character surveys the scene before turning to walk along the ledge where a companion waits.

events.description: character begins walking along rooftop following companion

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the concrete rooftop following a companion through the overgrown urban environment

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead leading the way across the rooftop

entered.detail: weathered flat concrete surface of the abandoned building
thick green vines covering the building walls and railings

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a concrete rooftop covered in ivy and vines, following a companion through the rain. The city skyline remains visible in the background as they navigate the elevated path of the abandoned structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with glass barriers overlooking flooded street

events.description: character climbs down from upper rooftop to lower elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: carefully descending to a lower level then walking along a narrow elevated walkway with glass walls

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead on the narrow walkway

entered.detail: transparent glass panels forming the safety barrier of the walkway
rusted metal support structure holding the glass panels
abandoned building facade covered in vegetation adjacent to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a narrow elevated walkway with glass and metal barriers, following a companion along the path. The walkway overlooks the flooded streets below, with rain streaming down the glass panels as they proceed through the abandoned structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a flooded urban street up to the heights of an abandoned cityscape under a heavy rainstorm. It begins with the character swimming through water covered in lily pads past a submerged car, before climbing a muddy bank to transition from water to land. As the character moves inland along a narrow dirt path flanked by dense tall grass, the scene opens up onto a high concrete overlook that reveals a breathtaking vista of submerged streets and distant skyscrapers. The camera then follows the character across an ivy-covered rooftop, maintaining the skyline in the background while navigating the rain-slicked ruins. Finally, the perspective descends to a narrow elevated walkway where rain streams down glass and metal barriers as the character follows a companion deeper into the abandoned structure.
